Author: Akari
Name: Consolidator
Description: Consolidates gil from your alt characters onto a single main. Logs into each character, travels to a chosen world via Lifestream, walks to your main with vnavmesh, trades over all gil above a floor you set, then returns to the FC. Requires AutoRetainer, Lifestream and vnavmesh; the receiving character needs Dropbox running to auto-accept the trades.
Punchline: Sweep gil from every alt onto one character.
